home.guide.welcome.d: A trading network for art collectors and creators, born in Berlin.
home.guide.browse.d: Tap "aRT" in the nav to explore available pieces from artists worldwide.
home.guide.view.d: Click any piece to see full details — images, dimensions, provenance, and more.
home.guide.inquire.d: Found something you like? Hit "TaLK" to start a conversation with the seller.
home.guide.join.d: Become a member to unlock favourites, boutique access, and more. Free tier available.

apparel.label: aPPaREL
boutique.title:
hIGHER sTANDARDS.
nO sHORTCUTS.
boutique.sub: We believe Berlin's art scene deserves a space where quality isn't negotiable. The boutique is where we raise the bar — curated pieces from artists who push boundaries, vetted by us, presented without compromise.
boutique.b1.p: Anyone can host a gallery. We're building something narrower. Every piece in the boutique is selected — not by algorithm, not by popularity, but by whether it moves the conversation forward.
boutique.b2.h: tHE aRTIST sTILL oWNS tHE dECISION.
boutique.b2.p: Curation doesn't mean control. Artists set their price, their terms, their vision. We choose what enters the room. They decide what happens inside it.
boutique.b3.p: Higher-end art requires higher-end trust. Provenance checks, verified artists, transparent commissions. If we ask collectors to invest more, we owe them more in return.
boutique.b4.h: wE'RE nOT rEADY yET. aNd tHAT'S tHE pOINT.
boutique.b4.p: We could rush this. Open the doors, fill the walls, call it premium. But that would be exactly the kind of thing we built aRTS to stand against. When the boutique opens, it will be because we've earned it.
boutique.status.note: Building the verification pipeline, onboarding early artists, refining the curation criteria. Members will be first to know.

inquire.flow.note: No account needed. No fees. Just direct conversation between you and the creator.
